author: Daniel Arji
content: I just want to say thank you to all the guys and girls at Feed for the amazing food and service as always but especially for the amazing burgers on Friday night when I proposed to my girlfriend!!... Sorry to keep you waiting for her answer (getting 👀👀👀👀👀 sent to me in the evening cracked me up 😂)... She said yes 💍.... And we say YES to Feed! 😁
